# Wraps

> Email infrastructure you own.

Wraps deploys production-ready email infrastructure to your AWS account. Modern DX. AWS economics. Your infrastructure.

## What Wraps Does

### CLI (`@wraps.dev/cli`)
One command deploys complete email infrastructure to your AWS account:

```bash
npx @wraps.dev/cli email init
```

Deploys: AWS SES with DKIM, Lambda event processing, DynamoDB history, EventBridge + SQS event capture, IAM roles with OIDC (Vercel, AWS native).

### Platform (app.wraps.dev)
Visual dashboard with progressive feature unlocks:

**Starter ($10/mo):** Templates with AI generation, batch sending, analytics, 30-day history, 5 workflows
**Growth ($49/mo):** Topics (subscription management), Segments, Campaigns, 25 workflows
**Scale ($149/mo):** Unlimited workflows, event tracking, advanced segments, multi-tenant orchestration

### TypeScript SDKs

```typescript
// Email SDK (@wraps.dev/email)
import { Wraps } from '@wraps.dev/email';
const wraps = new Wraps();

await wraps.emails.send({
  from: 'hello@yourapp.com',
  to: 'user@example.com',
  subject: 'Welcome!',
  html: '<h1>Hello from Wraps!</h1>',
});

// Batch send to all contacts
await wraps.batch.send({
  subject: 'Product Update',
  templateId: 'tmpl_xxx',
  from: 'updates@company.com',
});
```

**Available packages:**
- `@wraps.dev/email` - Email sending via AWS SES
- `@wraps.dev/sms` - SMS via AWS End User Messaging
- `@wraps.dev/cdn` - Asset delivery via AWS CloudFront
- `@wraps.dev/cli` - Infrastructure deployment CLI
- `@wraps.dev/cdk` - AWS CDK constructs for email infrastructure
- `@wraps.dev/pulumi` - Pulumi components for email infrastructure

## Key Differentiators

- **Your AWS Account**: Infrastructure deploys to your account, not ours
- **No Vendor Lock-in**: Your infrastructure keeps working if you stop paying us
- **AWS Prices**: Pay AWS directly ($0.10/1K emails), no markup
- **Under 2 Minutes**: `npx @wraps.dev/cli email init` and done
- **Unlimited Contacts**: Gate on events (what costs money), not vanity metrics
- **Zero Credentials Stored**: OIDC authentication, no AWS secrets

## Pricing

| | Free | Starter | Growth | Scale |
|--|------|---------|--------|-------|
| **Price** | $0 | $10/mo | $49/mo | $149/mo |
| **Dashboard** | Self-host | Hosted | Hosted | Hosted |
| **Contacts** | Unlimited | Unlimited | Unlimited | Unlimited |
| **Workflows** | — | 5 | 25 | Unlimited |
| **Features** | CLI/SDK | + Templates, Analytics | + Topics, Segments, Campaigns | + Events, Advanced Segments |

You pay Wraps for tooling. You pay AWS for infrastructure. No surprises.

**Example**: 100K emails/month = $10-49 (Wraps) + ~$10 (AWS) = $20-59 total
Managed services charge $80-150+ for the same volume.

## Installation

```bash
# Deploy infrastructure
npx @wraps.dev/cli email init

# Install SDK
npm install @wraps.dev/email
```

## Links

- Website: https://wraps.dev
- Documentation: https://wraps.dev/docs
- Quickstart: https://wraps.dev/docs/quickstart/email
- SDK Reference: https://wraps.dev/docs/sdk-reference
- CLI Reference: https://wraps.dev/docs/cli-reference
- GitHub (SDK): https://github.com/wraps-team/wraps-js
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@wraps.dev/email

## Use Cases

- Transactional emails (welcome, password reset, receipts)
- Marketing broadcasts with segmentation
- Automated email workflows (drip campaigns, onboarding)
- Developer applications needing email with full AWS control

## Technical Stack

- Infrastructure: Pulumi deploying to AWS (SES, DynamoDB, Lambda, EventBridge, SQS)
- SDK: TypeScript, works with any Node.js framework
- Platform: Next.js 15, React 19, shadcn/ui, Elysia API
- Database: PostgreSQL (Neon) + Drizzle ORM
- Auth: Better Auth with OIDC (Vercel, AWS native)

## Contact

- Support: support@wraps.dev
- Twitter: @useWraps
